items.title: Kering's $3.9 billion quarter shows Gucci isn't fixed yet
items.summary: Kering Q1 2026 revenue fell 6% to €3.57B; Gucci sales declined 8% on a comparable basis. North America was a bright spot, up 9%, driven by new products and stronger execution across handbags, ready-to-wear, and shoes. Analysts remain skeptical of a near-term full recovery.

items.title: Gucci's Contemporary Refresh Kickstarts with New Muses and a Campaign Shot by Demna
items.summary: Demna photographed Gucci's Generation Gucci campaign himself, featuring 84 images of friends and collaborators wearing updated classics including the Jackie 1961 bag and Dionysus with sharper lines. The campaign emphasizes 'gritty glamour' while honoring the house's heritage.

items.title: Gucci 'La Famiglia' 2026 Ad Campaign
items.summary: Demna's first Gucci campaign, photographed by Catherine Opie, features character-type models in clean backdrops. Critics note it functions as 'a holding pattern with style' — technically polished but lacking narrative depth and immersive world-building.

items.title: Gucci Faces Backlash Over AI Images Ahead of Demna's Milan Debut
items.summary: Gucci released four AI-generated promotional images labeled 'Created with AI' for its Milan Primavera show. North American fashion communities on social media reacted negatively, arguing AI production contradicts luxury craftsmanship at Gucci's price point. Brand silence amplified the damage.

items.title: Gucci's Highly Anticipated La Famiglia Collection Has Finally Hit Stores
items.summary: Demna's debut La Famiglia SS26 collection became available for purchase in January 2026 in Gucci boutiques and online. The release marks a key milestone in the brand's repositioning under new creative direction.

items.title: Gucci Cruise 2027 Collection To Be Shown in New York City
items.summary: Gucci announced its Cruise 2027 collection would be presented in New York City on May 16, 2026, marking Demna's debut cruise show. The choice of New York reflects strategic emphasis on the North American market, where luxury sales were expected to grow 4.5%.

items.title: Demna's Gucci Cruise 2027 Debut Was A Full-On New York Spectacle
items.summary: Gucci's Cruise 2027 show transformed Times Square into a celebrity-packed runway event. Tom Brady, Paris Hilton, Cindy Crawford, and Kim Kardashian participated, with the collection branded 'GucciCore.' Critics praised it as Demna's most commercially oriented and wearable Gucci work to date.

items.title: Inside Times Square — Sorry — Inside Gucci Cruise 2027
items.summary: Review of Gucci Cruise 2027 in Times Square notes the deliberate collapse between luxury and mass consumerism as a brand statement. Collection drew from Tom Ford tailoring and Alessandro Michele's web stripe motifs. Standout pieces included oversized furs, trench coats, and sheer finale looks.

items.title: Gucci Just Dropped Their New Summer Campaign
items.summary: Gucci's Summer 2026 campaign was shot in Monte Carlo, featuring a diverse international cast. The campaign centers on the reintroduced Flora print and a theme of 'luxury in motion.' Creative direction under Demna described as 'controversial and divisive' by publication.

items.title: EXCLUSIVE: Gucci to Show Cruise 2027 Collection in New York
items.summary: WWD exclusive revealing Gucci's plan to present its Cruise 2027 collection in New York City, the first time the brand stages a Cruise show in the US since Tom Ford's era. The announcement underscores Gucci's strategic prioritization of the North American market for the Demna relaunch.

items.title: Gucci's Moonlit Film from Jonathan Glazer Fuses Slipknot and Couture
items.summary: Gucci released 'Generation Gucci,' a short film by Oscar-winning director Jonathan Glazer, which fuses Slipknot's 1999 track '(sic)' with luxury fashion imagery. The unconventional pairing of metal music and haute couture generated significant coverage in US music and fashion media.

items.title: People = Chic: Gucci have used a Slipknot song in their new short film
items.summary: Rock music publication Kerrang! covered Gucci's use of Slipknot's '(sic)' in the Generation Gucci campaign film, signaling Demna's attempt to attract non-traditional luxury audiences in North America through crossover cultural references.

items.title: Front Row at Gucci Cruise 2027: Kim Kardashian, Mariah Carey, Lindsay Lohan and More Take Times Square
items.summary: WWD documented the celebrity front row at the Gucci Cruise 2027 Times Square show, including Kim Kardashian, Mariah Carey, Lindsay Lohan, Shawn Mendes, and Anna Wintour. The event drew widespread media coverage and public exposure beyond traditional fashion audiences.

items.title: Forum Members Review Demna's Fall 2026 Runway Debut as Gucci Creative Director
items.summary: Fashion forum communities debated Demna's Gucci Fall 2026 debut, raising concerns about proximity to Tom Ford references and lack of original vision. Critics questioned whether the collection departed enough from existing archetypes, though others found the expectation of radical change excessive.
